name: Expansion of 16 * (1 + k^2)^4 /(k * k'^2)^2 in powers of q where k is the Jacobian elliptic modulus, k' the complementary modulus and q is the nome.
formula: Expansion of 16 * (1 + k'^2)^4 /(k' * k^2)^2 in powers of q^2. - _Michael Somos_, Nov 11 2006
Empirical: Sum_{n>=0} a(n) / exp(n*Pi) = 648 * exp(-Pi) = A388184. - _Simon Plouffe_, Sep 15 2025
program: (PARI) {a(n) = my(A); if( n<-1, 0, n++; A = x * O(x^n); A = (eta(x + A) / eta(x^2 + A))^12; polcoeff( (A + 64 * x / A)^2, n))}; /* _Michael Somos_, Nov 11 2006 */
xref: Cf. A007241, A045478. Convolution square of A007247.
A045478, A007241, A106207, A007267, and A101558 are all essentially the same sequence.
